input_dict.question: How many regular seasons did the National Hokey League have up til the 1991-92 Edmonton Oilers season?
input_dict.source_summary: The 1991–92 Edmonton Oilers season (the Oilers' 13th season in the NHL) was part of the 1991–92 NHL season, which was the National Hockey League's 75th regular season.
input_dict.target_summary:
Integration of available evidence:
- Query note: the user likely meant "National Hockey League" (misspelled "National Hokey League").
- From the first-hop context: "The 1991–92 Edmonton Oilers season was the Oilers' 13th season in the NHL." (summary_1)
- From the retrieved NHL-level evidence: "The 1991–92 NHL season was the 75th regular season of the National Hockey League." (1991–92 NHL season)
These retained facts (Oilers' 13th NHL season and that 1991–92 was the NHL's 75th regular season) provide the evidence needed to determine how many NHL regular seasons had occurred up through the 1991–92 Edmonton Oilers season.
